# Michael Fenton, MRSNZ

> New Zealand scientist, researcher, and STEM educator based in Taranaki. Professional member of the Royal Society of New Zealand and a Ministry of Education E-Learning Fellow. Work spans molecular microbiology, low-cost science instrumentation, and STEM education across a 35-year research record archived on Zenodo.

Michael Fenton has taught every science and mathematics subject, plus coding and electronics, at secondary and sub-degree level, and has led the design of NZQA-approved qualifications from Level 3 to Level 7. He founded the Nexus Research Group, believed to be New Zealand's only secondary school-based research laboratory, with Dr Sir William Pickering as patron. He is seeking PhD enrolment by publication, and is available for employment and education consultancy.

- Home: https://mikefentonnz.github.io/
- Research Outputs and Publications: https://mikefentonnz.github.io/research-outputs-publications-portfolio.html
- Teaching, Instructional Design and Moderation: https://mikefentonnz.github.io/teaching-instructional-design-moderation.html
- Projects and STEM Inventions: https://mikefentonnz.github.io/projects-stem-inventions.html
- Workshops, Talks and Science Communication: https://mikefentonnz.github.io/workshops-talks-science-communication.html
- Nexus Research Group: https://mikefentonnz.github.io/nexus-research-group.html
- Design by Subversion (working framework, not yet peer-reviewed): https://mikefentonnz.github.io/design-by-subversion-stem-framework.html
- Curriculum Vitae: https://mikefentonnz.github.io/curriculum-vitae-michael-fenton.html

## Key research outputs (Zenodo, permanent DOIs)
- Casio Graphing Calculator Serial Interface, priority disclosure (2026): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19303911
- RIGEL-WEB, self-contained HTML sensor interface (2026): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20541487
- SMART, Sound-to-Motion Analysis and Recording Tool (2026): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20542011
- RIGEL, universal sensor interface (2026): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19508521
- Distance teacher professional development design materials (2026): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20078593
- Skill Standards: Navigating Old Narrative Traps - A Briefing Note for Instructional Designers in New Zealand Vocational Education and Training (2026): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20337481
- Rediscovering the 3-Pin Port, Casio RECEIVE() discovery (2025): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19281514
- The B9 Robot Mobile Laboratory (2024): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19528980
- Using a Digital Multi-meter as an Inexpensive Data Logger Substitute (2011): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19325413
- RIGEL, Learning From Life, conference paper (2009): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19334228
- Authentic Learning Using Mobile Sensor Technology (2008): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19302276
- Space Pioneer: William H Pickering, Rocket Man (2004): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19346544
- DNA and Genetic Engineering, practical protocols for school science (2003): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19347896
- Nexus (Nexus Research Group) (1999): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19365952
- Giardia and giardiasis in New Zealand (1994): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19423966
